title: antennaria monocephala subsp. philonipha
intro: Antennaria monocephala subsp. philonipha, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and silver-gray foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Antennaria monocephala subsp. philonipha include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be made by using the leaves and flowers, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
